title: Glucose-Stimulated Glucagon Secretion using Biorep Perifusion Machine - Mouse Islets
author: Aliya F Spigelman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.u6veze6

steps.title: Isolate mouse islets as described in Mouse Islet Isolation protocol
steps.instruction: Isolate mouse islets as described in Mouse Islet Isolation protocol.

steps.title: Pick the isolated mouse islets into...
steps.instruction: Pick the isolated mouse islets into Mouse Islet Culture Media (>90% islet purity). Mouse Islet Culture Media A B 1 500 mL RPMI (11.1mMglucose) Gibco 1875-119 2 50 mL FBS Canadian Origin Gibco12483-020 3 5 mL Penicllin-Streptomycin Gibco15140-122

steps.title: Culture islets, up to 250 islets...
steps.instruction: Culture islets, up to 250 islets in 2 mL in a 35mm culture dish, overnight in incubator at 37°C, 5% CO2.

steps.title: KRBH solution to be made fresh
steps.instruction: KRBH solution to be made fresh: A B C 1 mM Final per 100mL total volume 2 NaCl 140 7 mL (2M stock) 3 KCl 3.6 360 µL (1M stock) 4 CaCl2 2.6 260 µL (1M stock) 5 NaH2PO4 0.5 50 µL (1M stock) 6 MgSO4 0.5 50 µL (1M stock) 7 HEPES 5 500 µL (1M stock) 8 NaHCO3 2 0.0168 g 9 Essentially fatty acid free BSA 0.5mg/ml 50 mg Warm above solution to 37°C (approximately 30min to1 hour). After warming the solution, pH to 7.45 with NaOH.

steps.title: Add glucose and/or additional treatments as required
steps.instruction: Add glucose and/or additional treatments as required.

steps.title: Set up the chambers and perifusion...
steps.instruction: Set up the chambers and perifusion machine according to Biorep instructions.

steps.title: Load islets into each chamber
steps.instruction: Load islets into each chamber. The number of islets will vary by experiment and sensitivity of ELISA.

steps.title: Run a 30 min pre-incubation as...
steps.instruction: Run a 30 min pre-incubation as previously set and discard the perfusate.

steps.title: Continue to run the perifusion protocol...
steps.instruction: Continue to run the perifusion protocol as samples are collected into a clean deep well plate(s).

steps.title: Upon perifusion protocol is completion, run...
steps.instruction: Upon perifusion protocol is completion, run the chambers dry, so islets are on the filter paper but no liquid remains. Place the filter paper with islets into a 1.5 mL tube with 500 μL of acid ethanol.

steps.title: Perfusate and islet content samples are...
steps.instruction: Perfusate and islet content samples are stored at -20°C until ELISA

steps.title: Perfusate is thawed and assayed using MSD glucagon Elisa kits
steps.instruction: Perfusate is thawed and assayed using MSD glucagon Elisa kits. Vortex content sample and dilute 1:200

steps.title: If desired, samples are assayed for...
steps.instruction: If desired, samples are assayed for Insulin using Alpco Stellux mouse insulin ELISA. Vortex islet content and dilute 1:1000.

steps.title: Acid Ethanol for islet content collection %s %s
steps.instruction: Acid Ethanol for islet content collection %s %s

steps.title: Set the protocol with glucose and...
steps.instruction: Set the protocol with glucose and experimental conditions (high KCl, inhibitors etc) and frequency of collection as needed using a flow rate of 100 μL/min for all steps. Set step 1 of the perifusion protocol to total 30 min. The number of replicates will vary based on number of lanes and plate orientation. This is a preincubation step that should fill one 96 well plate. The perfusate from this step will be disgarded.
